batch: Batch127 - P0 Final Runtime Closure Hardening
goal: Push P0 local/runtime/build confidence before P1 source work by requiring deterministic Node 24/Vercel configuration, strict raw Next build evidence, live smoke, auth smoke, source/data/type gates, and explicit hosted-rollout separation. Batch128 keeps this final gate compatible with newer P0 hardening versions.
localP0FinalRequired: vercel.json uses npm ci and npm run build
Next binary and platform SWC package are present
required .next artifacts exist after current build
production live HTTP smoke passes after current build
auth invite runtime smoke passes after current build

node24RuntimeProof.note: Local sandbox may run Node 22, but CI/Vercel must prove Node 24 before stronger P0 closure is claimed.
